raw_transcript_text:
DOCTOR: Namaste! Baithe, baithe. Kya problem hai aapki? Aaj kuch specific issue hai?

PATIENT: Namaste sir. Pet mein dikkat hai. Bahut time se acidity rehti hai, aur kabhi kabhi pet mein darad bhi hota hai. Aur haan, constipation bhi hai.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Pura din kaisa rehta hai? Khana khane ke baad burning sensation hoti hai? Ya koi aur problem?

PATIENT: Haan sir, khana khane ke baad burning hoti hai. Kabhi kabhi pet bhi phool jaata hai, aur hawa bhi nahi nikalta theek se.

DOCTOR: Achha. Aur toilet ka pattern kya hai? Roz jaate hain? Ya kabhi kabhi skip ho jaata hai?

PATIENT: Sir, kabhi to roz jaate hain, par kabhi 2-3 din nahi jaate. Aur jab jaate hain to bahut tight hota hai. Bahut mushkil se nikalta hai.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Kya aapko pata hai ye kab se chal raha hai? Mahino se? Ya saalon se?

PATIENT: Sir, lagbhag 2-3 saal ho gaye. Kabhi theek, kabhi kharab.

DOCTOR: Achha. Aur weight? Koi loss toh nahi hua? Ya blood aaya hai stool mein?

PATIENT: Nahi sir, weight to theek hai. Koi blood nahi aaya. Bas khana nahi lagta. Aur kabhi kabhi dard hota hai left side mein pet ke.

DOCTOR: Hmm, samajh gaya. Thoda stress rehta hai? Ya office ka kaam zyada hai? Raat ko neend theek aati hai?

PATIENT: Haan sir, stress to hai. Office ka kaam hai, raat ko der tak jaagna hota hai. Neend bhi poori nahi hoti.

DOCTOR: Koi aur medicine toh nahi le rahe roz? Jaise BP, diabetes, koi painkiller?

PATIENT: Nahi sir, koi nahi. Bas kabhi kabhi acidity ka ilaaj karte hain.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Chaliye, vitals check karte hain. BP loon?

PATIENT: Haan sir, le lo.

DOCTOR: Aapka BP hai... 140/90. Thoda borderline high hai. Pulse abhi 82 hai. Temperature normal. Theek hai. Ab pet check karte hain. Yahan left side mein koi dard hai?

PATIENT: Haan sir, yahan dard hota hai.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Pressure dene se bhi dard? Aur right side mein koi issue?

PATIENT: Nahi sir, right side theek hai. Yahan dard sirf left side mein hota hai.

DOCTOR: Achha. Koi sounding toh nahi hai? Jaise gas ka sound aata hai?

PATIENT: Haan sir, kabhi kabhi aata hai.

DOCTOR: Samajh gaya. Yeh IBS hai — Irritable Bowel Syndrome, ke saath constipation aur acidity bhi hai. Tension ki wajah se ye problem trigger hoti hai. Dhyan rakhna hoga. Ab main aapko kuch medicine deta hoon.

PATIENT: Theek hai sir, jo aap theek samjhe.

DOCTOR: Ek tablet Pan-D subah kahne se pehle, ek raat ko. Constipation ke liye kaunsa loon... haan, combination mein kuch denge: Ek syrup — Cremaffin plus, raat ko 2 spoon. Aur IBS control karne ke liye mebeverine hain — Colospa, subah sham 1 tablet. Theek hai?

PATIENT: Theek hai sir. Koi side effect toh nahi hoga?

DOCTOR: Nahi, koi baat nahi. Yeh safe hain. Aur BP thoda high hai toh stress kam karo, neend poori lo. Halka walk bhi kar lo daily. Aur pani zyada piyo. Yeh sab zaroori hai.

PATIENT: Haan sir, koshish karunga. Aur kya khana chahiye?

DOCTOR: Spicy food, chai, coffee, soft drinks — sab avoid karo. Roti sabzi theek hai. Dalia, oats, isabgol bhi le sakte hain. Aur doosra — raat ko khana halka khao, so ne se pehle 3-4 ghante pehle khaana khatam karo.

PATIENT: Theek hai sir, main follow karunga.

DOCTOR: 10 din baad aana follow-up ke liye. Agar tab tak bhi problem rahe toh kuch test bhi kar sakte hain. Abhi ke liye prescription likh raha hoon.

---

**Prescription:**

1. **Pan-D** (Pantoprazole + Domperidone) — 1 tab, empty stomach morning, 2.5 mg / 10 mg — 10 days  
2. **Cremaffin Plus** (Liquid Paraffin + Milk of Magnesia) — 2 tsp at bedtime — 10 days  
3. **Colospa** (Mebeverine 135 mg) — 1 tab twice a day (morning + evening) — 10 days  
4. **Shelcal 500** (Calcium + Vitamin D3) — 1 tab, once daily — 30 days  
5. **BP monitoring** — daily morning and evening, record and show next visit  

**Advice:**
- Avoid spicy, oily, fried food, tea/coffee
- Increase water intake (8-10 glasses/day)
- Include fiber-rich foods: isabgol, oats, dalia
- Light walk 20 min daily
- Take adequate sleep (7–8 hours)

DOCTOR: Theek hai? Agar koi problem ho toh call kar dena. Dhyan rakhna.

PATIENT: Thank you sir. Dhanyavaad.

soap_note.subjective: Patient reports chronic abdominal discomfort, frequent acidity, occasional abdominal pain, constipation for 2-3 years. Pain located in left side of abdomen. Postprandial burning sensation. Abdominal bloating and flatulence. Bowel habits irregular: constipation alternating with normal, hard stools. No weight loss, no blood in stool. Stress due to work, poor sleep. No regular medications.
soap_note.objective: BP 140/90, Pulse 82/min, Temperature normal. Abdominal examination: tenderness on left side, bowel sounds present.
soap_note.assessment: Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS) with constipation and dyspepsia. Borderline hypertension.
soap_note.plan: Prescribed Pan-D (Pantoprazole + Domperidone) 1 tab empty stomach morning, Cremaffin Plus 2 tsp at bedtime, Colospa (Mebeverine 135 mg) 1 tab twice daily, Shelcal 500 1 tab daily. Advised: avoid spicy/greasy food, tea/coffee; increase water and fiber intake; light exercise daily; adequate sleep; BP monitoring. Follow-up in 10 days.
